name: studioops
description: Install and run software work through a local senior AI engineering team and structured delivery board.

interface.shortDescription: A senior AI engineering team with a real workflow.
interface.longDescription: Set up a local StudioOps Community board, turn software ideas into structured projects and tasks, then move them through builders, domain review, lead review, QA, and a human release gate.
defaultPrompt: Set up StudioOps Community for this project.
Turn this mockup into StudioOps tasks.
